title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Milkbasket
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket family as a Software Engineer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket:
Milkbasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket!
